case_title: DISCOVER FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. VS. BARTOLOME BARABAD et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-20-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-04-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
